calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters of Administration. Shauna A. Johnson is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing is set for Feb-02-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Personal Representative shall file either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq. two weeks before this date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
